response.overview: When people think of Minnesota, why are they thinking what they're thinking? In this blast from the past, producers for Twin Cities PBS (or Channel 2 or KTCA) search high and low to find out: what does it really mean to be Minnesotan?  From 1979 to 1980, Channel 2 ran what they considered a weekly digital magazine. It was called Electronicle and it was considered progressive digital media for its time.
response.tagline: What is the myth of Minnesota?
response.title: The Myth of Minnesota
